hero.title: Stories of Change
hero.subtitle: Discover how communities across Europe are adapting to climate challenges through practical, place-based action.

cards.title: Restoring forest resilience in the Pyrenees
cards.excerpt: A participatory approach to reforest degraded slopes while strengthening local governance and fire-risk planning.

cards.title: Sustainable fisheries in Galicia
cards.excerpt: Fishers, scientists, and policymakers co-design monitoring tools to balance livelihoods with ecosystem recovery.

cards.title: Water-smart agriculture in Extremadura
cards.excerpt: Irrigation cooperatives pilot soil-moisture sensors and drought-tolerant varieties to secure harvests under heat stress.
